title: Update Background Image and Welcome Video for Post-OTP Login Screen
story: As a new DataTools Pro user who just verified my email or accepted a team invitation, I want to see a tailored welcome screen with an introductory video and unique background image, so that my first login experience feels personalized and informative.
description:
Follow-up to MBT-639. Updates the post-OTP verification login page with a distinct background image and introductory YouTube video to differentiate the welcome experience from the standard login.

## Changes
1. **Background image**: Download and host locally (avoiding cross-origin issues) from the WordPress site
2. **Welcome video**: Embed YouTube video (Dvq12EzBlBI) on the welcome screen
3. **Invited users**: Apply the same welcome image, video, and text to the login experience for invited users (team member invitations)
acceptance_criteria: Post-OTP login page displays a unique background image different from the standard login
Background image is hosted locally on the app server
Welcome YouTube video is embedded on the post-verification login page
Invited users also see the same welcome experience
Standard login page for returning users is unchanged
ux_changes: Post-OTP and post-invitation login pages now display a unique background image and embedded YouTube welcome video, creating a differentiated first-login experience.
middleware_changes: Conditional rendering extended to detect both OTP-verified and invited user sessions, serving the welcome variant for both paths.
implementation_notes: Background image downloaded from WordPress and hosted locally to avoid cross-origin issues. Welcome experience applied to both sign-up (OTP) and invitation flows. Tested for both paths.
comment_summary: Developer implemented and tested for both invite and sign-up flows, pushed to staging.
